gist.headline: Harvesting season
gist.blurb: The hive just got a new accounting department. Developers can now track exactly how much Pollen their apps are bringing in with a shiny new Earnings dashboard.
gist.summary: Added a new Earnings dashboard to the developer portal for tracking Pollen generated by apps with markup enabled.
gist.impact: Developers can now visualize their daily earnings, active users, and top-performing apps directly from the dashboard.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee wearing a tiny accountant's visor, reviewing a rising line chart on a retro monitor. The chunky robot companion excitedly holding a glowing yellow pollen coin.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny accountant's visor, looking at a retro computer monitor displaying a rising line chart. A chunky pixel robot companion happily holds a glowing yellow pollen coin. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
